Donate

Every donation helps a dog get care.

One-time gifts help right now. Monthly donors help the rescue plan for food, vet care, medication, bedding, and emergency needs.

Donate Ask about donations

Monthly giving

$25/month

Monthly giving is one of the simplest ways to create steady support. A dependable base helps the rescue say yes with less scrambling.

Donate

No amount is too small to matter.

One gift can feel small from the outside. Pooled together, those gifts become food, emergency medical care, medicine, shelter, bedding, overhead, and staff support.

Recurring support helps before a story goes viral. One-time donations help meet urgent needs as they come.

Other ways to give

Tax receipts and donation questions.

Underdog Heroes is a registered 501(c)(3). EIN: 84-4188282. For Venmo, PayPal, Zelle, mailed checks, or receipt requests, email Donations@Underdogheroes.org.

Underdog Heroes

Dog rescue for abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs who deserve a fighting chance.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
